news.title: Neues Lokal "Biernat's" – Kölsch statt Spritzer – Bar bringt Köln-Flair nach Wien - Heute
news.summary:
# Summary

A new bar called "Biernat's" has opened in Vienna, bringing Cologne's beer culture and atmosphere to the Austrian capital. The establishment specializes in Kölsch beer, the famous German beer style from Cologne, instead of Vienna's traditional wine-based drinks. Visitors to Vienna who enjoy German beer culture or want to experience authentic Cologne vibes will find this a worthwhile addition to the city's dining and drinking scene.

Visitors to Antwerp now have another option for dining and drinks from trusted hospitality professionals, with the same attention to detail they've established at their other locations.

news.title: Brunch com o seu cão? Este restaurante em Lisboa criou um menu só para ele - Marketeer

# Lisbon Restaurant Creates Special Dog Menu for Brunch

A Lisbon restaurant has launched a dedicated brunch menu designed specifically for dogs, allowing pet owners to dine with their canine companions. This unique offering makes the restaurant an ideal spot for dog-loving visitors to Lisbon who want to enjoy brunch without leaving their pets behind. The initiative caters to the growing pet-friendly dining trend in the city.
